### 管理命令

```bash
# 查看状态
launchctl list | grep supercodex

# 立即触发一次测试
bash ~/Documents/SuperCodex/reminder.sh

# 停止提醒
launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supercodex.reminder.plist

# 重新启动
launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supercodex.reminder.plist

# 卸载（彻底删除）
launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supercodex.reminder.plist
rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supercodex.reminder.plist
```

function.name: write_file
function.arguments:
{"path": "/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/agent-era-entrepreneurship.md", "content": "# Agent 时代的创业：当 AI 从工具变成协作者

## 引言

我们正在经历一场静悄悄的革命。如果说过去两年的 AI 浪潮是"大模型军备竞赛"，那么 2025 年开始，我们正式进入了 **Agent（智能体）时代**。这不是一个渐进式的变化，而是一次范式的跃迁——AI 不再仅仅是回答问题或生成内容的工具，而是开始成为能够**自主规划、执行任务、调用工具、做出决策**的数字协作者。

对于创业者来说，这意味着什么？机会在哪里？陷阱又在哪里？

## 一、Agent 时代的三层机会

### 1. 基础设施层：Agent 的操作系统

就像移动互联网时代的 iOS 和 Android，Agent 时代也需要自己的"操作系统"。这包括：

- **Agent 编排框架**：如何让多个 Agent 协同工作，分配任务，管理上下文
- **Agent 记忆与状态管理**：让 Agent 拥有长期记忆，而不是每次对话都"重新开始"
- **工具调用与 API 网关**：Agent 需要像人一样调用各种软件工具
- **安全与对齐层**：确保 Agent 的行为符合预期，不"越狱"

这一层的创业门槛极高，需要深厚的技术积累，但一旦做成，护城河极深。

### 2. 中间件层：Agent 的连接器

对于大多数创业者来说，中间件层可能是更实际的机会：

- **Agent 开发平台**：让非技术人员也能构建自己的 Agent
- **Agent 市场/商店**：类似 Shopify 的 App Store，但面向 Agent
- **Agent 监控与可观测性**：Agent 在做什么？为什么这么做？需要新的可观测性工具
- **Agent 数据管道**：为 Agent 准备结构化和非结构化数据

### 3. 应用层：垂直行业的 Agent 原生应用

这是目前最活跃、竞争也最激烈的领域。机会在于每一个行业都值得用 Agent 重做一遍：

- **客服 Agent**：从聊天机器人升级为能真正解决问题的智能客服
- **销售 Agent**：自动挖掘客户、撰写个性化方案、跟进商机
- **编程 Agent**：从代码补全到自动修复 Bug、重构代码
- **法律 Agent**：合同审查、法律检索、文书生成
- **医疗 Agent**：导诊、病历分析、用药建议
- **教育 Agent**：个性化辅导、作业批改、课程设计

## 二、Agent 时代创业的五大原则

### 原则 1：不要只做"披着 Agent 外衣的 Chatbot"

很多所谓的 Agent 产品本质上只是个加了 Prompt 的 GPT wrapper。真正的 Agent 必须具备：
- **自主决策能力**：能拆解目标、制定计划
- **工具使用能力**：能调用 API、操作软件、访问数据库
- **记忆能力**：能记住之前的交互和决策
- **反馈闭环**：能从执行结果中学习和调整

### 原则 2：先把一个场景做透

Agent 的能力边界还在快速扩展中。与其做一个"什么都干但什么都不精"的通用 Agent，不如深耕一个垂直场景，把准确率从 80% 做到 99%。

### 原则 3：人机协同 > 全自动

目前的技术水平下，完全无人值守的 Agent 风险很高。最好的模式是 **Human-in-the-loop（人在回路中）**——Agent 做 80% 的重复性工作，人类处理 20% 的例外和决策。这既提高了效率，又控制了风险。

### 原则 4：数据飞轮是核心壁垒

Agent 产品最大的护城河不是技术，而是数据。每一次用户与 Agent 的交互、每一次修正和反馈，都是训练 Agent 变得更好的数据。越快建立起数据飞轮，竞争对手就越难追赶。

### 原则 5：关注成本结构

调用大模型 API 的成本在快速下降，但仍然不可忽视。设计产品时，要像关注服务器成本一样关注"Token 成本"。缓存、蒸馏、小模型优先——这些技术将决定 Agent 产品的毛利。

## 三、几个值得关注的创业方向

### 方向一：企业级 Agent 平台

帮助企业构建、部署和管理内部 Agent。关键是解决企业关心的安全、合规、可审计问题。

### 方向二：个人 Agent 助理

从日程管理、邮件处理、信息聚合到购物比价，个人 Agent 助理可能是 Agent 时代的"杀手级应用"。

### 方向三：Agent 原生的 SaaS

传统 SaaS 是"人操作软件"，Agent 原生的 SaaS 是"Agent 操作软件"，或者"Agent 就是软件"。这不仅仅是 UI 的变化，而是整个交互范式的重构。

### 方向四：Agent 安全与治理

随着 Agent 的普及，Agent 安全将成为一个新的安全细分领域。Agent 权限管理、行为审计、对抗攻击防御——这些需求正在快速增长。

## 四、风险与警示

1. **技术不确定性**：Agent 的技术栈还在快速演进，今天的选择可能半年后就被淘汰
2. **成本风险**：复杂 Agent 的 Token 消耗可能远超预期
3. **信任问题**：用户是否信任 Agent 自主执行关键任务？
4. **监管风险**：AI 监管政策正在快速变化
5. **巨头的挤压**：Google、微软、OpenAI 都在大力投入 Agent

## 结语

Agent 时代不是未来的想象，而是正在发生的现实。每一次技术范式的转换，都是创业者重新洗牌的机会。移动互联网时代诞生了百亿美金的公司，Agent 时代同样会诞生新一代的独角兽。

关键不是预测未来，而是**在正确的时机，用正确的方式，解决一个真实的问题**。对于那些真正理解技术趋势、敬畏行业规律、愿意深耕场景的创业者来说，Agent 时代可能是我们这一代人遇到的最好的创业机会。

---

*如果你也在 Agent 领域创业或探索，欢迎在评论区交流想法！*
"}

                set index of w to 1

                    tell process "Google Chrome"

                    end tell

end tell

# Agent 时代的创业：当 AI 从工具变成协作者

## 引言

我们正在经历一场静悄悄的革命。如果说过去两年的 AI 浪潮是"大模型军备竞赛"，那么 2025 年开始，我们正式进入了 **Agent（智能体）时代**。这不是一个渐进式的变化，而是一次范式的跃迁——AI 不再仅仅是回答问题或生成内容的工具，而是开始成为能够**自主规划、执行任务、调用工具、做出决策**的数字协作者。

对于创业者来说，这意味着什么？机会在哪里？陷阱又在哪里？

## 一、Agent 时代的三层机会

### 1. 基础设施层：Agent 的操作系统

就像移动互联网时代的 iOS 和 Android，Agent 时代也需要自己的"操作系统"。这包括：

- **Agent 编排框架**：如何让多个 Agent 协同工作，分配任务，管理上下文
- **Agent 记忆与状态管理**：让 Agent 拥有长期记忆，而不是每次对话都"重新开始"
- **工具调用与 API 网关**：Agent 需要像人一样调用各种软件工具
- **安全与对齐层**：确保 Agent 的行为符合预期，不"越狱"

这一层的创业门槛极高，需要深厚的技术积累，但一旦做成，护城河极深。

... (83 more lines)

#!/bin/bash

# ========================================
# 休息喝水提醒脚本
# 每隔2小时弹出 macOS 通知
# ========================================

# 获取当前时间
HOUR=$(date +%H)
MINUTE=$(date +%M)

# 休息提醒
osascript -e "display notification \"💧 站起来走一走，喝杯水吧！
已经连续工作了2小时，给眼睛和身体放个假～\" with title \"⏰ 休息提醒\" subtitle \"该休息啦！\" sound name \"default\""

# 如果有 say 命令，也可以语音播报（可选）
# say "该休息了，站起来走一走，喝杯水吧"

echo "[$(date)] 休息提醒已发送"

function.name: write_file

{"path": "/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/reminder.sh", "content": "#!/bin/bash

# ========================================
# 🪴 休息喝水提醒脚本
# 每个整点提醒喝水，双数整点增加休息提醒
# ========================================

HOUR=$(date +%H)
MINUTE=$(date +%M)
TOTAL_MIN=$((10#$HOUR * 60 + 10#$MINUTE))
CYCLE=$((TOTAL_MIN / 45))  # 每45分钟一个周期

case $((CYCLE % 3)) in
  0)
    # 第1周期：喝水提醒
    osascript -e "display notification \"💧 端起杯子喝口水吧！
多喝水皮肤好，精神也更集中 💪\" with title \"🥤 喝水时间到\" subtitle \"该补水啦！\" sound name \"default\""
    echo "[$(date)] 💧 喝水提醒已发送"
    ;;
  1)
    # 第2周期：休息提醒
    osascript -e "display notification \"🧘 站起来活动一下！
离开座位走走，看看远方，给眼睛放个假 🌿\" with title \"🚶 休息时间到\" subtitle \"该活动啦！\" sound name \"default\""
    echo "[$(date)] 🚶 休息提醒已发送"
    ;;
  2)
    # 第3周期：综合提醒
    osascript -e "display notification \"🌸 休息 + 喝水双重提醒
☕ 喝杯水
🧘 伸个懒腰
👀 眺望远方20秒\" with title \"🌟 综合健康提醒\" subtitle \"关爱自己～\" sound name \"default\""
    echo "[$(date)] 🌟 综合健康提醒已发送"
    ;;
esac
"}

## ✅ 定时提醒任务已成功配置！

### 📊 服务状态

| 项目 | 状态 |
|------|------|
| 🟢 服务进程 | **运行中** (PID: 35324, 已运行 18秒) |
| 🔄 循环间隔 | **每 45 分钟** |
| 🚀 开机自启 | ✅ **已启用** (launchd) |
| 💻 后台驻留 | ✅ 无终端依赖 |

### 📋 提醒循环（每135分钟一个完整周期）

| 次序 | 提醒内容 | 间隔 |
|:---:|:---------|:---:|
| ① | 🥤 **喝水时间到** — "端起杯子喝口水吧！" | 第1个45分钟 |
| ② | 🚶 **休息时间到** — "站起来活动一下，眺望远方" | 第2个45分钟 |
| ③ | 🌟 **综合健康提醒** — "喝水+伸懒腰+休息眼睛" | 第3个45分钟 |
| 🔄 | *循环往复...* | |

### 🛠 快捷命令

```bash
npm run reminder          # 手动启动提醒
npm run reminder:status   # 查看服务状态
npm run reminder:stop     # 停止服务
npm run reminder:start    # 重新启动服务
```

> 💡 **提示**：通知会通过 macOS 原生弹窗显示，即使在工作或全屏应用中也能看到。每45分钟轮换不同类型的提醒，避免审美疲劳 😄

Readable text:
知乎，让每一次点击都充满意义 —— 欢迎来到知乎，发现问题背后的世界。

没关系，虽然在线搜索结果受限，但关于这个话题我有足够的知识积累。下面是一份**全面的实操指南**👇

---

# 🔥 互联网算法岗 & HR 谈薪全攻略

## 一、先搞清楚「总包」的构成

算法岗的薪资不是单一的月薪，而是 **「总包（Total Package）」**，通常包括：

| 组成部分 | 说明 | 谈判空间 |
|---------|------|---------|
| **基本月薪** | 每月固定工资 | ✅ 核心谈判项 |
| **年终奖** | 通常 12-16 薪，大厂常见 14-16 薪 | ✅ 可确认保底 |
| **股票/期权（RSU）** | 分 4 年归属，每年 25% 解锁 | ✅ 核心谈判项 |
| **签字费（Sign-on Bonus）** | 入职一次性发放，1-3 个月工资 | ✅ 可争取 |
| **安家费/搬家补贴** | 异地入职可谈 | ✅ 可争取 |
| **房补/餐补/交通补** | 每月固定补贴 | ⚠️ 通常固定 |

> 💡 **公式：总包 = 月薪 × 月数 + 股票年归属价值 + 签字费（一次性）**

---

## 二、谈薪前必做的 4 步准备

### 1️⃣ 摸清市场行情
- 在 **脉脉、OfferShow、牛客网** 搜索同级别、同方向（CV/NLP/搜推广等）的 offer 数据
- 根据你的 **学历（985/海归/双非）**、**年限（校招/1-3年/3-5年）**、**公司级别（T4/T5/P6/P7 等）** 定锚点
- 大厂算法岗参考区间（2024-2025）：
  - 🎓 校招 SSP：45-60w 总包
  - 🎓 校招 SP：35-45w 总包
  - 🎓 校招普通：28-35w 总包
  - 💼 社招 L5/P7 级：80-150w+ 总包

### 2️⃣ 准备好你的「筹码清单」
谈判前想清楚你的**议价资本**：
- 手上有几个 offer？有无竞品公司 offer？
- 有没有顶会论文（NeurIPS/CVPR/ICML）？
- 有没有竞赛（Kaggle/KDD Cup）成绩？
- 之前的业绩亮点（AUC 提升、CTR 提升、业务增长）

### 3️⃣ 了解对方的预算范围
HR 手上通常有一个 **薪资范围（band）**：
- **下限**：HR 希望你接受的价
- **中位数**：匹配你能力的价
- **上限**：需要特批的价
- ⚡ 有竞品 offer 可以直接逼到上限甚至超出

### 4️⃣ 确定你的「底线」和「目标」
- **底线价**：低于这个就不去了
- **满意价**：拿到就开心的数字
- **理想价**：需要使劲争取的

---

## 三、与 HR 谈判的实战技巧

### 🎯 技巧 1：永远不要先报价
- ❌ **错误示范**："我的期望薪资是 35k"
- ✅ **正确做法**："我了解这个级别在贵司大概是 xx 到 yy 的范围，但我也想知道您这边能给我的定级和薪资范围"
- HR 先出价的一方往往处于劣势

### 🎯 技巧 2：用竞品 offer 逼价
这是算法岗最有用的谈判武器：
> "我目前手上还有 xx 公司的 offer，他们给了 A 级的总包约 X 万。但我更倾向贵司的业务方向，如果贵司能给到接近的水平（约 Y 万），我可以很快做决定。"

### 🎯 技巧 3：把焦点放在「总包」而非月薪
- 月薪有固定上限（公司薪酬带宽），但**股票+签字费**弹性更大
- 话术示例："月薪我理解贵司有体系，那能否在签字费或股票上做一些补偿？"

### 🎯 技巧 4：强调你的「唯一性」
算法岗**人才稀缺**，强调你的独特价值：
- "我发表的 xxx 论文方向与贵司业务高度匹配"
- "我之前做的 xxx 项目直接带来了 YY% 的业务提升"
- "我对这个方向有 deep insight，上手速度会比一般候选人快很多"

### 🎯 技巧 5：利用「时间差」制造压力
- "另一家公司的 offer 截止日期是这周五，我很希望能优先考虑贵司"
- 给 HR 一个合理的 deadline，倒逼对方走审批流程

### 🎯 技巧 6：不要只盯钱，关注「非薪资项」
如果薪资实在谈不动了，可以谈：
- **股票加速归属**（比如改为 3 年归属）
- **更大签字费**
- **入职时间灵活**
- **假期/培训资源**
- **级别上调**（同一薪资升级别，下次跳槽有利）

---

## 四、HR 常用「压价套路」及拆招

| 套路 | HR 怎么说 | 你怎么回 |
|------|----------|---------|
| **「薪资倒挂」** | "这个薪资已经比老员工高了" | "市场行情在变化，我的能力值这个价，老员工的股票也增值了" |
| **「我们有培养体系」** | "我们这边能学到很多" | "我认可成长空间，但薪资也是我个人价值的体现，希望两者兼得" |
| **「我们预算就这么多」** | "这已经是最高了" | "能否帮我问问是否有特批通道？或者能否在签字费/股票上灵活处理？" |
| **「你经验还不够」** | "这个薪资对新人来说很好了" | "我的项目产出可以证明我有 senior 级别的产出能力" |
| **「我们福利很好」** | "加上福利其实不止这个数" | "福利我了解，但希望能实打实地体现在总包里" |

---

## 五、算法岗特有的加分筹码

算法岗和普通开发不同，以下筹码在谈薪时特别有用：

1. **顶会论文** 🔬 — NeurIPS/CVPR/ICML/ICLR → 可直接加薪 5-15w
2. **高引工作** 📈 — 说明影响力
3. **开源贡献** 🐙 — GitHub star 高的项目
4. **竞赛排名** 🏆 — Kaggle Grandmaster / 天池冠军
5. **业务落地经验** 🚀 — 模型上线、AB实验、业务指标提升
6. **特定方向稀缺性** — 大模型/多模态/RLHF 等热门方向溢价更高

---

## 六、最后提醒：避坑清单

| 序号 | ❌ 不要做 | ✅ 应该做 |
|------|---------|---------|
| 1 | 刚到 offer 就立刻接受 | 至少争取 1-2 轮谈判 |
| 2 | 编造虚假 offer 逼价 | 如果被背调发现会很被动 |
| 3 | 态度过于强硬或威胁 | 保持专业、尊重、合作的态度 |
| 4 | 只看月薪不看总包 | 用 Excel 拉一个总包对比表 |
| 5 | 忽略股票估值风险 | 未上市公司的期权要打折扣评估 |
| 6 | 拖延太久不回复 | 合理时效内回复，避免 offer 被撤回 |

---

**总结一句话：** 算法岗的薪资谈判，核心是**用好信息差 + 合理展示筹码 + 关注总包而非单项**。HR 不是你的敌人，TA 的任务是招到人，你的任务是让 TA 知道**招你最划算**。

如果你有具体的 offer 情况（公司、级别、方向、当前报价），我可以帮你具体分析怎么谈！💪

# 📈 互联网算法岗涨薪幅度全解析

## 一、不同场景的涨薪幅度

### 🚀 跳槽涨薪（最常见）

| 级别 | 普通水平 | 理想水平 | 天花板（有竞品offer） |
|------|---------|---------|-------------------|
| **校招→社招（1-3年）** | 20-30% | 30-50% | 50-80% |
| **社招（3-5年）** | 15-25% | 25-40% | 40-60% |
| **高级/专家（5年+）** | 10-20% | 20-35% | 35-50% |
| **阿里P7+/字节3-2+** | 10-15% | 15-30% | 30-40% |

> **2024-2025年市场的实况**：整体不如前几年火热，大厂算法岗跳槽涨薪**通常落在 20-35%** 区间，优秀者可到 40-50%。能超过 50% 的案例多发生在：
> - 基层跳中层（如 P6→P7 跨级跳）
> - 小厂跳大厂且手上有多个竞品 offer
> - 超级热门方向（大模型/多模态/AIGC）人才

### 📊 内部晋升涨薪

| 晋升类型 | 涨薪幅度 |
|---------|---------|
| **普通晋升（如 P5→P6, 2-1→2-2）** | 15-25%（含股票调整） |
| **破格/跨级晋升** | 25-40% |
| **普调（年度涨薪）** | 3-10%（通常 5-8%） |
| **普调+晋升叠加** | 20-35% |

> ⚠️ **内部晋升的痛点**：涨幅通常低于跳槽。这也是互联网行业「跳槽涨薪 > 晋升涨薪」的普遍现象。所以在互联网圈有个潜规则：**想大涨幅，每 2-3 年跳一次**。

### 💰 平级跳 vs 升级跳

| 类型 | 含义 | 涨薪幅度 | 难度 |
|------|-----|---------|------|
| **平级跳** | 同级（如 P6→P6） | 15-30% | 相对容易 |
| **升级跳** | 升一级（如 P6→P7） | 30-60% | 需要面试表现突出 |
| **跨级跳** | 升两级 | 50-100% | 极少见，需非常优秀 |

---

## 二、算法岗 vs 普通开发的涨薪差异

| 维度 | 算法岗 | 普通开发 |
|------|-------|---------|
| **跳槽平均涨幅** | 25-40% | 15-30% |
| **稀缺方向溢价** | +10-20%（大模型/搜推广/NLP） | +5-10% |
| **顶会论文加成** | 可多谈 5-15w 年薪 | 通常无此加成 |
| **校招SSP vs 普通** | 差距可达 20-30w/年 | 差距 10-15w/年 |

---

## 三、影响涨薪幅度的关键因素

### 🔑 决定性因素（权重从高到低）

1. **当前薪资基数** 📌
   - 基数越高，百分比涨幅越难谈
   - 30k→45k（+50%）比 50k→75k（+50%）容易得多
   - 常见现象：**薪资越高，涨幅越低**

2. **竞品 offer 数量** 🏆
   - 0 个竞品：涨幅 10-20%
   - 1 个竞品：涨幅 20-35%
   - 2+ 个竞品：涨幅 30-50%
   - 字节/阿里/腾讯互相竞价时，可以逼到 40-60%

3. **方向稀缺度** 🔥
   - 大模型/LLM 训练：溢价最高，+20-30%
   - 搜推广/推荐系统：稳定需求，+15-25%
   - CV/NLP 基础方向：+10-20%
   - 数据挖掘/BI 方向：+10-15%

4. **公司类型组合**
   | 从 → 到 | 典型涨幅 |
   |---------|---------|
   | 小厂→大厂 | 30-50% |
   | 大厂→大厂 | 15-30% |
   | 大厂→小厂（带团队） | 20-40%（+股票/期权） |
   | 外企→互联网大厂 | 30-60% |

---

## 四、各细分方向的具体市场行情

### 🤖 大模型/AIGC 方向（2024-2025 最热）

| 经验 | 跳槽涨幅参考 |
|------|------------|
| 校招（有相关项目） | 40-80%（SSP 居多） |
| 1-3 年经验 | 30-50% |
| 3-5 年经验 | 25-40% |

> 💡 大模型方向现在极度缺人，**有预训练/RLHF/SFT 实战经验**的候选人，涨幅下限即可到 30%

### 🔍 搜推广（搜索/推荐/广告）

| 经验 | 跳槽涨幅参考 |
|------|------------|
| 校招 | 25-40% |
| 1-3 年 | 20-35% |
| 3-5 年 | 15-30% |

### 👁️ CV / 🗣️ NLP（传统方向）

| 经验 | 跳槽涨幅参考 |
|------|------------|
| 校招 | 15-30% |
| 1-3 年 | 15-25% |
| 3-5 年 | 10-20% |

---

## 五、涨薪谈判实操：怎么谈出上限

### ✅ 谈高涨幅的 4 个话术策略

**策略 1：用总包比较法**
> "我现在总包是 X 万（月薪×月数+股票），按 30% 涨幅是 Y 万。但我希望总包能到 Z 万，因为……"

**策略 2：亮出稀缺性**
> "我在大模型（填具体方向）方向有 xx 经验，这个方向的候选人在市场上比较稀缺。我也面了其他几家，反馈都很好。"

**策略 3：强调短期产出**
> "我上手很快，入职第一个月就能独立推进项目，不需要很长的 ramp-up 周期。"

**策略 4：让 HR 帮你算总账**
> "如果月薪实在有硬性限制，能不能在签字费/股票/年终保障上多给一些？这样总包也能接近我的预期。"

---

## 六、行业趋势对涨薪的影响

| 年度 | 市场热度 | 算法岗平均跳槽涨幅 |
|------|---------|-----------------|
| 2021-2022（高峰） | 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 | 30-50% |
| 2023（回调） | 🔥🔥🔥 | 20-35% |
| 2024（复苏） | 🔥🔥🔥🔥 | 20-40% |
| 2025（结构化分化） | 🔥🔥🔥（局部热） | 15-40%（因方向而异） |

> 📌 **当下趋势总结**：
> - 大模型/AIGC 方向一枝独秀，涨幅明显高于其他方向
> - 传统算法方向（CV/NLP 非大模型）竞争加剧，涨幅承压
> - **攒 offer 比价**依然是获取高涨幅的最有效手段

---

**一句话总结：** 算法岗跳槽涨薪的**基准线是 20-30%**，达到 **30-40%** 算优秀，突破 **50%** 需要天时地利人和（热门方向+竞品 offer+面试表现突出）。如果低于 15%，建议认真考虑是否值得跳。

# SuperCodex

SuperCodex 是一个本地运行的通用办公 Agent。它提供类似 Codex / Kimi Work 的任务式交互体验，但模型 API 可以自由接入，只要兼容 OpenAI Chat Completions 接口即可。

项目当前定位不是单纯 coding agent，而是面向办公、研究、文件处理、网页任务、本地项目修改和自动化流程的通用 Agent 工作台。

## 核心特性

- OpenAI-compatible API 接入，支持 DeepSeek、OpenAI、兼容网关或自建模型服务。
- Agent 自主判断是否调用工具，后端不再用固定规则决定工具开关。
- 最多 200 轮工具调用，适合较长任务链。
- 流式执行过程展示，前端可实时看到任务步骤、工具调用和工具结果。
- 本地项目加载，可让 Agent 读取、搜索、修改项目文件并运行测试。
- 文件和图片附件上传，支持通过加号菜单或粘贴添加。
- 图片处理能力，支持缩放、裁剪、旋转、灰度、模糊、锐化、翻转和格式转换。
- 网络搜索能力，基于 `open-websearch`。
- Kimi WebBridge 集成，可连接真实浏览器执行网页任务。
- 自动安全护栏：常规工具调用默认自动执行，删除、强制清理、仓库重置、格式化、提权等危险命令会被后端直接拦截。
- 工具输出清洗，避免浏览器任务把 HTML / DOM / 原始 JSON 直接输出给用户。
- 任务步骤卡片和产物卡片，让执行过程和交付物更接近真实办公工作流。

## 技术栈

- 前端：React 19 + Vite 7 + TypeScript
- 后端：Express 5 + TypeScript
- 图像处理：Sharp
- 文件上传：Multer
- 网络搜索：open-websearch
- 浏览器控制：Kimi WebBridge
- 状态存储：本地 `.supercodex/state.json` 索引 + `.supercodex/conversations/` 会话目录

## 项目结构

```text
SuperCodex/
├── server/
│   └── index.ts              # Express API、Agent Loop、工具注册
├── src/
│   ├── App.tsx               # 主前端界面与交互逻辑
│   ├── App.css               # 界面样式
│   └── main.tsx              # React 入口
├── .supercodex/              # 本地持久化状态和上传文件
├── .env.example              # 环境变量示例
├── package.json
├── vite.config.ts
└── README.md
```

## 快速开始

/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/.supercodex/conversations/Agent_-ba745d47/messages.json:377: "arguments": "{\"path\": \"/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/agent-era-entrepreneurship.md\", \"content\": \"# Agent 时代的创业：当 AI 从工具变成协作者\\n\\n## 引言\\n\\n我们正在经历一场静悄悄的革命。如果说过去两年的 AI 浪潮是\\\"大模型军备竞赛\\\"，那么 2025 年开始，我们正式进入了 **Agent（智能体）时代**。这不是一个渐进式的变化，而是一次范式的跃迁——AI 不再仅仅是回答问题或生成内容的工具，而是开始成为能够**自主规划、执行任务、调用工具、做出决策**的数字协作者。\\n\\n对于创业者来说，这意味着什么？机会在哪里？陷阱又在哪里？\\n\\n## 一、Agent 时代的三层机会\\n\\n### 1. 基础设施层：Agent 的操作系统\\n\\n就像移动互联网时代的 iOS 和 Android，Agent 时代也需要自己的\\\"操作系统\\\"。这包括：\\n\\n- **Agent 编排框架**：如何让多个 Agent 协同工作，分配任务，管理上下文\\n- **Agent 记忆与状态管理**：让 Agent 拥有长期记忆，而不是每次对话都\\\"重新开始\\\"\\n- **工具调用与 API 网关**：Agent 需要像人一样调用各种软件工具\\n- **安全与对齐层**：确保 Agent 的行为符合预期，不\\\"越狱\\\"\\n\\n这一层的创业门槛极高，需要深厚的技术积累，但一旦做成，护城河极深。\\n\\n### 2. 中间件层：Agent 的连接器\\n\\n对于大多数创业者来说，中间件层可能是更实际的机会：\\n\\n- **Agent 开发平台**：让非技术人员也能构建自己的 Agent\\n- **Agent 市场/商店**：类似 Shopify 的 App Store，但面向 Agent\\n- **Agent 监控与可观测性**：Agent 在做什么？为什么这么做？需要新的可观测性工具\\n- **Agent 数据管道**：为 Agent 准备结构化和非结构化数据\\n\\n### 3. 应用层：垂直行业的 Agent 原生应用\\n\\n这是目前最活跃、竞争也最激烈的领域。机会在于每一个行业都值得用 Agent 重做一遍：\\n\\n- **客服 Agent**：从聊天机器人升级为能真正解决问题的智能客服\\n- **销售 Agent**：自动挖掘客户、撰写个性化方案、跟进商机\\n- **编程 Agent**：从代码补全到自动修复 Bug、重构代码\\n- **法律 Agent**：合同审查、法律检索、文书生成\\n- **医疗 Agent**：导诊、病历分析、用药建议\\n- **教育 Agent**：个性化辅导、作业批改、课程设计\\n\\n## 二、Agent 时代创业的五大原则\\n\\n### 原则 1：不要只做\\\"披着 Agent 外衣的 Chatbot\\\"\\n\\n很多所谓的 Agent 产品本质上只是个加了 Prompt 的 GPT wrapper。真正的 Agent 必须具备：\\n- **自主决策能力**：能拆解目标、制定计划\\n- **工具使用能力**：能调用 API、操作软件、访问数据库\\n- **记忆能力**：能记住之前的交互和决策\\n- **反馈闭环**：能从执行结果中学习和调整\\n\\n### 原则 2：先把一个场景做透\\n\\nAgent 的能力边界还在快速扩展中。与其做一个\\\"什么都干但什么都不精\\\"的通用 Agent，不如深耕一个垂直场景，把准确率从 80% 做到 99%。\\n\\n### 原则 3：人机协同 > 全自动\\n\\n目前的技术水平下，完全无人值守的 Agent 风险很高。最好的模式是 **Human-in-the-loop（人在回路中）**——Agent 做 80% 的重复性工作，人类处理 20% 的例外和决策。这既提高了效率，又控制了风险。\\n\\n### 原则 4：数据飞轮是核心壁垒\\n\\nAgent 产品最大的护城河不是技术，而是数据。每一次用户与 Agent 的交互、每一次修正和反馈，都是训练 Agent 变得更好的数据。越快建立起数据飞轮，竞争对手就越难追赶。\\n\\n### 原则 5：关注成本结构\\n\\n调用大模型 API 的成本在快速下降，但仍然不可忽视。设计产品时，要像关注服务器成本一样关注\\\"Token 成本\\\"。缓存、蒸馏、小模型优先——这些技术将决定 Agent 产品的毛利。\\n\\n## 三、几个值得关注的创业方向\\n\\n### 方向一：企业级 Agent 平台\\n\\n帮助企业构建、部署和管理内部 Agent。关键是解决企业关心的安全、合规、可审计问题。\\n\\n### 方向二：个人 Agent 助理\\n\\n从日程管理、邮件处理、信息聚合到购物比价，个人 Agent 助理可能是 Agent 时代的\\\"杀手级应用\\\"。\\n\\n### 方向三：Agent 原生的 SaaS\\n\\n传统 SaaS 是\\\"人操作软件\\\"，Agent 原生的 SaaS 是\\\"Agent 操作软件\\\"，或者\\\"Agent 就是软件\\\"。这不仅仅是 UI 的变化，而是整个交互范式的重构。\\n\\n### 方向四：Agent 安全与治理\\n\\n随着 Agent 的普及，Agent 安全将成为一个新的安全细分领域。Agent 权限管理、行为审计、对抗攻击防御——这些需求正在快速增长。\\n\\n## 四、风险与警示\\n\\n1. **技术不确定性**：Agent 的技术栈还在快速演进，今天的选择可能半年后就被淘汰\\n2. **成本风险**：复杂 Agent 的 Token 消耗可能远超预期\\n3. **信任问题**：用户是否信任 Agent 自主执行关键任务？\\n4. **监管风险**：AI 监管政策正在快速变化\\n5. **巨头的挤压**：Google、微软、OpenAI 都在大力投入 Agent\\n\\n## 结语\\n\\nAgent 时代不是未来的想象，而是正在发生的现实。每一次技术范式的转换，都是创业者重新洗牌的机会。移动互联网时代诞生了百亿美金的公司，Agent 时代同样会诞生新一代的独角兽。\\n\\n关键不是预测未来，而是**在正确的时机，用正确的方式，解决一个真实的问题**。对于那些真正理解技术趋势、敬畏行业规律、愿意深耕场景的创业者来说，Agent 时代可能是我们这一代人遇到的最好的创业机会。\\n\\n---\\n\\n*如果你也在 Agent 领域创业或探索，欢迎在评论区交流想法！*\\n\"}"

/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/.supercodex/conversations/Agent_-ba745d47/messages.json:377: "arguments": "{\"path\": \"/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/agent-era-entrepreneurship.md\", \"content\": \"# Agent 时代的创业：当 AI 从工具变成协作者\\n\\n## 引言\\n\\n我们正在经历一场静悄悄的革命。如果说过去两年的 AI 浪潮是\\\"大模型军备竞赛\\\"，那么 2025 年开始，我们正式进入了 **Agent（智能体）时代**。这不是一个渐进式的变化，而是一次范式的跃迁——AI 不再仅仅是回答问题或生成内容的工具，而是开始成为能够**自主规划、执行任务、调用工具、做出决策**的数字协作者。\\n\\n对于创业者来说，这意味着什么？机会在哪里？陷阱又在哪里？\\n\\n## 一、Agent 时代的三层机会\\n\\n### 1. 基础设施层：Agent 的操作系统\\n\\n就像移动互联网时代的 iOS 和 Android，Agent 时代也需要自己的\\\"操作系统\\\"。这包括：\\n\\n- **Agent 编排框架**：如何让多个 Agent 协同工作，分配任务，管理上下文\\n- **Agent 记忆与状态管理**：让 Agent 拥有长期记忆，而不是每次对话都\\\"重新开始\\\"\\n- **工具调用与 API 网关**：Agent 需要像人一样调用各种软件工具\\n- **安全与对齐层**：确保 Agent 的行为符合预期，不\\\"越狱\\\"\\n\\n这一层的创业门槛极高，需要深厚的技术积累，但一旦做成，护城河极深。\\n\\n### 2. 中间件层：Agent 的连接器\\n\\n对于大多数创业者来说，中间件层可能是更实际的机会：\\n\\n- **Agent 开发平台**：让非技术人员也能构建自己的 Agent\\n- **Agent 市场/商店**：类似 Shopify 的 App Store，但面向 Agent\\n- **Agent 监控与可观测性**：Agent 在做什么？为什么这么做？需要新的可观测性工具\\n- **Agent 数据管道**：为 Agent 准备结构化和非结构化数据\\n\\n### 3. 应用层：垂直行业的 Agent 原生应用\\n\\n这是目前最活跃、竞争也最激烈的领域。机会在于每一个行业都值得用 Agent 重做一遍：\\n\\n- **客服 Agent**：从聊天机器人升级为能真正解决问题的智能客服\\n- **销售 Agent**：自动挖掘客户、撰写个性化方案、跟进商机\\n- **编程 Agent**：从代码补全到自动修复 Bug、重构代码\\n- **法律 Agent**：合同审查、法律检索、文书生成\\n- **医疗 Agent**：导诊、病历分析、用药建议\\n- **教育 Agent**：个性化辅导、作业批改、课程设计\\n\\n## ",
/Users/a1021500689/Documents/SuperCodex/.supercodex/conversations/conversation-0db93770/messages.json:220:      "content": "import cors from "cors";
import "dotenv/config";
import express from "express";
import { exec } from "node:child_process";
import { promises as fs } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";
import { promisify } from "node:util";

const execAsync = promisify(exec);
const app = express();
const port = Number(process.env.PORT ?? 8787);

// ─── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type Role = "system" | "user" | "assistant" | "tool";

type ToolCall = {
  id: string;
  type: "function";
  function: { name: string; arguments: string };
};

type ChatMessage = {
  role: Role;
  content: string | null;
  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];
  tool_call_id?: string;
  name?: string;
};

type ToolDefinition = {
  type: "function";
  function: {
    name: string;
    description: string;
    parameters: Record<string, unknown>;
  };
};

type ToolResult = {
  tool_call_id: string;
  content: string;
  isError?: boolean;
};

type ApiConfig = {
  baseUrl?: string;
  apiKey?: string;
  model?: string;
};

type Message = {
  id: string;
  role: Exclude<Role, "system" | "tool">;
  content: string;
  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];
  createdAt: string;
};

type ToolMessage = {
  id: string;
  role: "tool";
  content: string;
  tool_call_id: string;
  toolName: string;
  createdAt: string;
};

type StoredMessage = Message | ToolMessage;

type Conversation = {
  id: string;
  projectId: string;
  title: string;
  shortcut?: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  messages: StoredMessage[];
};

type Project = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  conversations: string[];
};

type Skill = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  accent: string;
  connected: boolean;
  installed: boolean;
  npmPackage?: string;
};

type Automation = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  schedule: string;
  enabled: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
};

type ChatCompletionResponse = {
  id?: string;
  model?: string;
  choices?: Array<{
    message?: {
      content?: string;
      tool_calls?: ToolCall[];
    };
  }>;
  usage?: unknown;
  error?: { message?: string };
};

type PersistedStore = {
  projects: Project[];
  conversations: Conversation[];
  skills: Skill[];
  automations: Automation[];
};

// ─── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const MAX_AGENT_TURNS = 10;
const WORKSPACE_ROOT = process.cwd();
const DATA_DIR = path.join(WORKSPACE_ROOT, ".supercodex");
const DATA_FILE = path.join(DATA_DIR, "state.json");
const DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS = [
  /\brm\s+-rf\b/,
  /\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b/,
  /\bgit\s+clean\s+-fd\b/,
  /\bsudo\b/,
  />\s*\/dev\/(disk|rdisk)/,
  /\bmkfs\b/,
  /\bdd\s+if=/
];

const systemPrompt =
  "You are SuperCodex, a general office agent. Help with workplace tasks such as email, documents, research, planning, automation, meetings, operations, and cross-app workflows. " +
  "Be practical, concise, and action-oriented. " +
  "You have access to tools. Use them when they can help complete the task. " +
  "When a tool call is needed, respond with tool_calls. When you have the final answer, respond with plain text content.";

// ─── Settings ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const settings: Required<ApiConfig> = {
  baseUrl: process.env.API_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1",
  apiKey: process.env.API_KEY ?? "",
  model: process.env.API_MODEL ?? "gpt-4.1"
};

// ─── Tool Registry ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const tools = new Map<string, ToolDefinition>();
const toolHandlers = new Map<string, (args: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<string>>();

function registerTool(definition: ToolDefinition, handler: (args: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<string>) {
  tools.set(definition.function.name, definition);
  toolHandlers.set(definition.function.name, handler);
}

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "search_web",
      description: "Search the web for information. Returns top results.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          query: { type: "string", description: "Search query" },
          num: { type: "number", description: "Number of results (default 5)" }
        },
        required: ["query"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const query = String(args.query || "");
    const num = Number(args.num) || 5;
    try {
      const url = `https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`;
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        headers: { "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0" }
      });
      const html = await response.text();
      const results: string[] = [];
      const regex = /class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]*)"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/a>/g;
      let match;
      while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null && results.length < num) {
        results.push(`[${match[2]}](${match[1]})`);
      }
      return results.length > 0
        ? results.map((r, i) => `${i + 1}. ${r}`).join("\n")
        : "No results found.";
    } catch (error) {
      return `Search failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "run_command",
      description: "Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          command: { type: "string", description: "Shell command to execute" },
          cwd: { type: "string", description: "Working directory (optional)" }
        },
        required: ["command"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const command = String(args.command || "");
    const cwd = safeResolvePath(String(args.cwd || WORKSPACE_ROOT));
    const denied = DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS.find((pattern) => pattern.test(command));
    if (denied) {
      return `Command blocked by SuperCodex safety policy: ${command}`;
    }
    try {
      const result = await execAsync(command, {
        cwd,
        timeout: 30_000,
        maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 * 5
      });
      const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join("\n");
      return output || "(Command executed successfully, no output)";
    } catch (error) {
      const err = error as Error & { stdout?: string; stderr?: string };
      return `Error: ${err.stderr || err.message}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "read_file",
      description: "Read the contents of a file.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "File path (absolute or relative)" },
          limit: { type: "number", description: "Max lines to read (default 200)" }
        },
        required: ["path"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const filePath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || ""));
    const limit = Number(args.limit) || 200;
    try {
      const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
      const lines = content.split("\n");
      const truncated = lines.slice(0, limit).join("\n");
      return lines.length > limit
        ? `${truncated}\n\n... (truncated, ${lines.length - limit} more lines)`
        : truncated;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to read file: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "write_file",
      description: "Write content to a file.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "File path" },
          content: { type: "string", description: "File content" }
        },
        required: ["path", "content"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const filePath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || ""));
    const content = String(args.content || "");
    try {
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
      await fs.writeFile(filePath, content, "utf-8");
      return `File written successfully: ${filePath}`;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to write file: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "list_directory",
      description: "List files and directories in a given path.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "Directory path (default: current working directory)" }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const dirPath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || WORKSPACE_ROOT));
    try {
      const entries = await fs.readdir(dirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
      return entries
        .map((e) => (e.isDirectory() ? `[dir] ${e.name}` : `[file] ${e.name}`))
        .join("\n") || "(Empty directory)";
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to list directory: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "install_skill",
      description: "Install a skill/package via npm. Use this to extend capabilities.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          package: { type: "string", description: "npm package name to install" },
          save: { type: "boolean", description: "Save to package.json (default true)" }
        },
        required: ["package"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const pkg = String(args.package || "");
    const save = args.save !== false;
    const flag = save ? "--save" : "";
    try {
      const result = await execAsync(`npm install ${pkg} ${flag}`, {
        cwd: process.cwd(),
        timeout: 120_000,
        maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 * 10
      });
      skills.forEach((skill) => {
        if (skill.npmPackage === pkg) {
          skill.installed = true;
        }
      });
      return `Package installed: ${pkg}\n${result.stdout}`;
    } catch (error) {
      const err = error as Error & { stderr?: string };
      return `Failed to install ${pkg}: ${err.stderr || err.message}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "fetch_url",
      description: "Fetch the content of a URL and return as text/markdown.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          url: { type: "string", description: "URL to fetch" }
        },
        required: ["url"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const url = String(args.url || "");
    try {
      const response = await fetch(url);
      const text = await response.text();
      const truncated = text.slice(0, 8000);
      return truncated.length >= 8000
        ? `${truncated}\n\n... (content truncated)`
        : truncated;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to fetch URL: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

function getToolDefinitions(): ToolDefinition[] {
  return [...tools.values()];
}

async function executeToolCall(toolCall: ToolCall): Promise<ToolResult> {
  const handler = toolHandlers.get(toolCall.function.name);
  if (!handler) {
    return {
      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
      content: `Unknown tool: ${toolCall.function.name}`,
      isError: true
    };
  }
  try {
    const args = JSON.parse(toolCall.function.arguments);
    const result = await handler(args);
    return { tool_call_id: toolCall.id, content: result };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
      content: `Tool execution error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      isError: true
    };
  }
}

// ─── In-Memory Store ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const projects = new Map<string, Project>();
const conversations = new Map<string, Conversation>();
const skills = new Map<string, Skill>();
const automations = new Map<string, Automation>();

await initializeStore();

// ─── Express Setup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json({ limit: "4mb" }));

app.get("/api/health", (_req, res) => {
  res.json({
    ok: true,
    configured: Boolean(settings.baseUrl && settings.apiKey),
    model: settings.model,
    baseUrl: settings.baseUrl,
    tools: [...tools.keys()]
  });
});

app.get("/api/app", (_req, res) => {
  res.json(getAppState());
});

app.get("/api/settings", (_req, res) => {
  res.json(maskSettings(settings));
});

app.put("/api/settings", (req, res) => {
  const body = req.body as ApiConfig;
  if (typeof body.baseUrl === "string") settings.baseUrl = body.baseUrl.trim();
  if (typeof body.apiKey === "string") settings.apiKey = body.apiKey.trim();
  if (typeof body.model === "string") settings.model = body.model.trim();
  res.json(maskSettings(settings));
});

app.post("/api/projects", async (req, res) => {
  const { name } = req.body as { name?: string };
  const project = createProject(name?.trim() || "新项目");
  await persistStore();
  res.status(201).json(project);
});

app.post("/api/conversations", async (req, res) => {
  const body = req.body as { projectId?: string; title?: string };
  const project = body.projectId ? projects.get(body.projectId) : [...projects.values()][0];
  if (!project) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "project not found" });
    return;
  }

  const conversation = createConversation(
    project.id,
    body.title?.trim() || "新任务",
    `⌘${Math.min(conversations.size + 1, 9)}`
  );
  await persistStore();
  res.status(201).json(conversation);
});

app.get("/api/conversations/:id/messages", (req, res) => {
  const conversation = conversations.get(req.params.id);
  if (!conversation) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "conversation not found" });
    return;
  }
  res.json({ messages: conversation.messages });
});

// ─── Agent Loop Endpoint ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

app.post("/api/conversations/:id/messages", async (req, res) => {
  const conversation = conversations.get(req.params.id);
  const { content, config } = req.body as { content?: string; config?: ApiConfig };
  const prompt = content?.trim();

  if (!conversation) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "conversation not found" });
    return;
  }

  if (!prompt) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "content is required" });
    return;
  }

  const userMessage: Message = {
    id: id("message"),
    role: "user",
    content: prompt,
    createdAt: now()
  };
  conversation.messages.push(userMessage);
  conversation.title = titleFromPrompt(prompt);
  conversation.updatedAt = now();
  await persistStore();

  try {
    const agentResult = await runAgentLoop(conversation, config);
    res.status(201).json({
      conversation,
      userMessage,
      assistantMessage: agentResult.finalMessage,
      toolCalls: agentResult.toolCalls,
      turns: agentResult.turns
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown server error"
    });
  }
});

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const body = req.body as {
    messages?: ChatMessage[];
    config?: ApiConfig;
  };

  if (!body.messages?.length) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "messages is required" });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const content = await completeChat(body.messages, body.config);
    res.json({
      id: id("chat"),
      model: body.config?.model ?? settings.model,
      content,
      usage: null
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown server error"
    });
  }
});

app.post("/api/tools/run-command", async (req, res) => {
  const { command, cwd } = req.body as { command?: string; cwd?: string };

  if (!command) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "command is required" });
    return;
  }

  const denied = DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS.find((pattern) => pattern.test(command));
  if (denied) {
    res.status(403).json({
      ok: false,
      code: 403,
      stdout: "",
      stderr: `Command blocked by SuperCodex safety policy: ${command}`
    });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const result = await execAsync(command, {
      cwd: safeResolvePath(cwd || WORKSPACE_ROOT),
      timeout: 20_000,
      maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024
    });

    res.json({
      ok: true,
      stdout: result.stdout,
      stderr: result.stderr
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error & { stdout?: string; stderr?: string; code?: number };
    res.status(200).json({
      ok: false,
      code: err.code ?? 1,
      stdout: err.stdout ?? "",
      stderr: err.stderr ?? err.message
    });
  }
});

// ─── Agent Loop (ReAct) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type AgentResult = {
  finalMessage: Message;
  toolCalls: Array<{ id: string; name: string; args: string; result: string }>;
  turns: number;
};

async function runAgentLoop(
  conversation: Conversation,
  config?: ApiConfig
): Promise<AgentResult> {
  const chatMessages: ChatMessage[] = [
    { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
    ...conversation.messages.map(toChatMessage)
  ];

  const toolCallLog: Array<{ id: string; name: string; args: string; result: string }> = [];
  let turns = 0;
  const allowTools = shouldEnableTools(conversation);

  while (turns < MAX_AGENT_TURNS) {
    turns++;

    const response = await callLLM(chatMessages, config, allowTools);

    const choice = response.choices?.[0];
    const message = choice?.message;

    if (!message) {
      throw new Error("LLM returned no choices");
    }

    // If LLM wants to call tools
    if (message.tool_calls && message.tool_calls.length > 0) {
      const assistantToolMessage: Message = {
        id: id("message"),
        role: "assistant",
        content: message.content?.trim() || "",
        tool_calls: message.tool_calls,
        createdAt: now()
      };
      conversation.messages.push(assistantToolMessage);
      conversation.updatedAt = assistantToolMessage.createdAt;

      // Add assistant message with tool_calls
      chatMessages.push({
        role: "assistant",
        content: message.content || null,
        tool_calls: message.tool_calls
      });

      // Execute each tool and add results
      for (const toolCall of message.tool_calls) {
        const result = await executeToolCall(toolCall);
        toolCallLog.push({
          id: toolCall.id,
          name: toolCall.function.name,
          args: toolCall.function.arguments,
          result: result.content
        });

        conversation.messages.push({
          id: id("message"),
          role: "tool",
          content: result.content,
          tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
          toolName: toolCall.function.name,
          createdAt: now()
        });
        conversation.updatedAt = now();

        chatMessages.push({
          role: "tool",
          content: result.content,
          tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
          name: toolCall.function.name
        });

        console.log(`[Tool] ${toolCall.function.name}(${toolCall.function.arguments}) => ${result.content.slice(0, 100)}...`);
      }

      // Continue loop - LLM will get tool results and decide next step
      await persistStore();
      continue;
    }

    // LLM returned final text response
    const finalContent = message.content?.trim() || "模型没有返回内容。";

    const assistantMessage: Message = {
      id: id("message"),
      role: "assistant",
      content: finalContent,
      createdAt: now()
    };
    conversation.messages.push(assistantMessage);
    conversation.updatedAt = now();
    await persistStore();

    return {
      finalMessage: assistantMessage,
      toolCalls: toolCallLog,
      turns
    };
  }

  // Max turns reached - force a final response
  chatMessages.push({
    role: "system",
    content: "You have reached the maximum number of tool calls. Please provide your final answer based on what you have gathered."
  });

  const response = await callLLM(chatMessages, config, false);
  const finalContent = response.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim() || "已达到最大工具调用次数限制。";

  const assistantMessage: Message = {
    id: id("message"),
    role: "assistant",
    content: finalContent,
    createdAt: now()
  };
  conversation.messages.push(assistantMessage);
  conversation.updatedAt = now();
  await persistStore();

  return {
    finalMessage: assistantMessage,
    toolCalls: toolCallLog,
    turns
  };
}

async function callLLM(messages: ChatMessage[], config?: ApiConfig, enableTools = false) {
  const effective = {
    baseUrl: normalizeBaseUrl(config?.baseUrl || settings.baseUrl),
    apiKey: config?.apiKey || settings.apiKey,
    model: config?.model || settings.model
  };

  if (!effective.baseUrl || !effective.apiKey) {
    return {
      choices: [{
        message: {
          content: fallbackOfficeReply(messages),
          tool_calls: undefined
        }
      }]
    } as ChatCompletionResponse;
  }

  const toolsArray = enableTools ? getToolDefinitions() : [];

  const upstream = await fetch(`${effective.baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${effective.apiKey}`,
      "Content-Type": "application/json"
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      model: effective.model,
      messages,
      ...(toolsArray.length > 0 ? { tools: toolsArray, tool_choice: "auto" } : {}),
      temperature: 0.2
    })
  });

  const payload = (await upstream.json()) as ChatCompletionResponse;
  if (!upstream.ok) {
    throw new Error(payload?.error?.message ?? "Upstream API request failed");
  }

  return payload;
}

async function completeChat(messages: ChatMessage[], config?: ApiConfig) {
  const response = await callLLM(messages, config, false);
  return response.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim() || "模型没有返回内容。";
}

function fallbackOfficeReply(messages: ChatMessage[]) {
  const lastUser = [...messages].reverse().find((message) => message.role === "user");
  const task = lastUser?.content || "这个任务";
  return [
    `我已经收到：${task}`,
    "",
    "在未配置 API Key 的本地模式下，我可以先给出一个可执行的办公 Agent 处理框架：",
    "1. 明确目标、交付物和截止时间。",
    "2. 收集相关邮件、文档、聊天记录或网页资料。",
    "3. 提炼结论、风险和下一步行动。",
    "4. 生成可复用的回复、报告、清单或自动化流程。",
    "",
    "配置真实模型 API 后，这里会切换为你的模型输出。"
  ].join("\n");
}

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function shouldEnableTools(conversation: Conversation) {
  const lastUser = [...conversation.messages]
    .reverse()
    .find((message): message is Message => message.role === "user");
  const text = lastUser?.content.toLowerCase() || "";
  const toolSignals = [
    "搜索",
    "查一下",
    "网页",
    "http://",
    "https://",
    "运行",
    "命令",
    "shell",
    "终端",
    "文件",
    "读取",
    "写入",
    "目录",
    "安装",
    "npm",
    "fetch",
    "search",
    "read",
    "write",
    "list",
    "install"
  ];
  return toolSignals.some((signal) => text.includes(signal));
}

function toChatMessage(msg: StoredMessage): ChatMessage {
  if (msg.role === "tool") {
    return {
      role: "tool",
      content: msg.content,
      tool_call_id: msg.tool_call_id,
      name: msg.toolName
    };
  }
  return {
    role: msg.role,
    content: msg.content,
    tool_calls: (msg as Message).tool_calls
  };
}

async function initializeStore() {
  try {
    const raw = await fs.readFile(DATA_FILE, "utf-8");
    const store = JSON.parse(raw) as PersistedStore;
    store.projects.forEach((project) => projects.set(project.id, project));
    store.conversations.forEach((conversation) => conversations.set(conversation.id, conversation));
    store.skills.forEach((skill) => skills.set(skill.id, skill));
    store.automations.forEach((automation) => automations.set(automation.id, automation));
    ensureSeedSkills();
  } catch (error) {
    seedState();
    await persistStore();
  }
}

async function persistStore() {
  const store: PersistedStore = {
    projects: [...projects.values()],
    conversations: [...conversations.values()],
    skills: [...skills.values()],
    automations: [...automations.values()]
  };
  await fs.mkdir(DATA_DIR, { recursive: true });
  await fs.writeFile(DATA_FILE, JSON.stringify(store, null, 2), "utf-8");
}

function safeResolvePath(inputPath: string) {
  const resolved = path.resolve(WORKSPACE_ROOT, inputPath || ".");
  if (resolved !== WORKSPACE_ROOT && !resolved.startsWith(`${WORKSPACE_ROOT}${path.sep}`)) {
    throw new Error(`Path is outside workspace: ${inputPath}`);
  }
  return resolved;
}

// ─── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type Role = "system" | "user" | "assistant" | "tool";

type ToolCall = {
  id: string;
  type: "function";
  function: { name: string; arguments: string };
};

type ChatMessage = {
  role: Role;
  content: string | null;
  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];
  tool_call_id?: string;
  name?: string;
};

type ToolDefinition = {
  type: "function";
  function: {
    name: string;
    description: string;
    parameters: Record<string, unknown>;
  };
};

type ToolResult = {
  tool_call_id: string;
  content: string;
  isError?: boolean;
};

type ApiConfig = {
  baseUrl?: string;
  apiKey?: string;
  model?: string;
};

type Message = {
  id: string;
  role: Exclude<Role, "system" | "tool">;
  content: string;
  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];
  createdAt: string;
};

type ToolMessage = {
  id: string;
  role: "tool";
  content: string;
  tool_call_id: string;
  toolName: string;
  createdAt: string;
};

type StoredMessage = Message | ToolMessage;

type Conversation = {
  id: string;
  projectId: string;
  title: string;
  shortcut?: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  messages: StoredMessage[];
};

type Project = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  conversations: string[];
};

type Skill = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  accent: string;
  connected: boolean;
  installed: boolean;
  npmPackage?: string;
};

type Automation = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  schedule: string;
  enabled: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
};

type ChatCompletionResponse = {
  id?: string;
  model?: string;
  choices?: Array<{
    message?: {
      content?: string;
      tool_calls?: ToolCall[];
    };
  }>;
  usage?: unknown;
  error?: { message?: string };
};

type PersistedStore = {
  projects: Project[];
  conversations: Conversation[];
  skills: Skill[];
  automations: Automation[];
};

// ─── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const MAX_AGENT_TURNS = 10;
const WORKSPACE_ROOT = process.cwd();
const DATA_DIR = path.join(WORKSPACE_ROOT, ".supercodex");
const DATA_FILE = path.join(DATA_DIR, "state.json");
const DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS = [
  /\brm\s+-rf\b/,
  /\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b/,
  /\bgit\s+clean\s+-fd\b/,
  /\bsudo\b/,
  />\s*\/dev\/(disk|rdisk)/,
  /\bmkfs\b/,
  /\bdd\s+if=/
];

const systemPrompt =
  "You are SuperCodex, a general office agent. Help with workplace tasks such as email, documents, research, planning, automation, meetings, operations, and cross-app workflows. " +
  "Be practical, concise, and action-oriented. " +
  "You have access to tools. Use them when they can help complete the task. " +
  "When a tool call is needed, respond with tool_calls. When you have the final answer, respond with plain text content.";

// ─── Settings ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const settings: Required<ApiConfig> = {
  baseUrl: process.env.API_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1",
  apiKey: process.env.API_KEY ?? "",
  model: process.env.API_MODEL ?? "gpt-4.1"
};

// ─── Tool Registry ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const tools = new Map<string, ToolDefinition>();
const toolHandlers = new Map<string, (args: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<string>>();

function registerTool(definition: ToolDefinition, handler: (args: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<string>) {
  tools.set(definition.function.name, definition);
  toolHandlers.set(definition.function.name, handler);
}

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "search_web",
      description: "Search the web for information. Returns top results.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          query: { type: "string", description: "Search query" },
          num: { type: "number", description: "Number of results (default 5)" }
        },
        required: ["query"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const query = String(args.query || "");
    const num = Number(args.num) || 5;
    try {
      const url = `https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`;
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        headers: { "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0" }
      });
      const html = await response.text();
      const results: string[] = [];
      const regex = /class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]*)"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/a>/g;
      let match;
      while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null && results.length < num) {
        results.push(`[${match[2]}](${match[1]})`);
      }
      return results.length > 0
        ? results.map((r, i) => `${i + 1}. ${r}`).join("\n")
        : "No results found.";
    } catch (error) {
      return `Search failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "run_command",
      description: "Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          command: { type: "string", description: "Shell command to execute" },
          cwd: { type: "string", description: "Working directory (optional)" }
        },
        required: ["command"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const command = String(args.command || "");
    const cwd = safeResolvePath(String(args.cwd || WORKSPACE_ROOT));
    const denied = DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS.find((pattern) => pattern.test(command));
    if (denied) {
      return `Command blocked by SuperCodex safety policy: ${command}`;
    }
    try {
      const result = await execAsync(command, {
        cwd,
        timeout: 30_000,
        maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 * 5
      });
      const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join("\n");
      return output || "(Command executed successfully, no output)";
    } catch (error) {
      const err = error as Error & { stdout?: string; stderr?: string };
      return `Error: ${err.stderr || err.message}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "read_file",
      description: "Read the contents of a file.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "File path (absolute or relative)" },
          limit: { type: "number", description: "Max lines to read (default 200)" }
        },
        required: ["path"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const filePath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || ""));
    const limit = Number(args.limit) || 200;
    try {
      const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
      const lines = content.split("\n");
      const truncated = lines.slice(0, limit).join("\n");
      return lines.length > limit
        ? `${truncated}\n\n... (truncated, ${lines.length - limit} more lines)`
        : truncated;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to read file: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "write_file",
      description: "Write content to a file.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "File path" },
          content: { type: "string", description: "File content" }
        },
        required: ["path", "content"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const filePath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || ""));
    const content = String(args.content || "");
    try {
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
      await fs.writeFile(filePath, content, "utf-8");
      return `File written successfully: ${filePath}`;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to write file: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "list_directory",
      description: "List files and directories in a given path.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "Directory path (default: current working directory)" }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const dirPath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || WORKSPACE_ROOT));
    try {
      const entries = await fs.readdir(dirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
      return entries
        .map((e) => (e.isDirectory() ? `[dir] ${e.name}` : `[file] ${e.name}`))
        .join("\n") || "(Empty directory)";
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to list directory: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(

    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "install_skill",
      description: "Install a skill/package via npm. Use this to extend capabilities.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          package: { type: "string", description: "npm package name to install" },
          save: { type: "boolean", description: "Save to package.json (default true)" }
        },
        required: ["package"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const pkg = String(args.package || "");
    const save = args.save !== false;
    const flag = save ? "--save" : "";
    try {
      const result = await execAsync(`npm install ${pkg} ${flag}`, {
        cwd: process.cwd(),
        timeout: 120_000,
        maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 * 10
      });
      skills.forEach((skill) => {
        if (skill.npmPackage === pkg) {
          skill.installed = true;
        }
      });
      return `Package installed: ${pkg}\n${result.stdout}`;
    } catch (error) {
      const err = error as Error & { stderr?: string };
      return `Failed to install ${pkg}: ${err.stderr || err.message}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "fetch_url",
      description: "Fetch the content of a URL and return as text/markdown.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          url: { type: "string", description: "URL to fetch" }
        },
        required: ["url"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const url = String(args.url || "");
    try {
      const response = await fetch(url);
      const text = await response.text();
      const truncated = text.slice(0, 8000);
      return truncated.length >= 8000
        ? `${truncated}\n\n... (content truncated)`
        : truncated;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to fetch URL: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

function getToolDefinitions(): ToolDefinition[] {
  return [...tools.values()];
}

async function executeToolCall(toolCall: ToolCall): Promise<ToolResult> {
  const handler = toolHandlers.get(toolCall.function.name);
  if (!handler) {
    return {
      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
      content: `Unknown tool: ${toolCall.function.name}`,
      isError: true
    };
  }
  try {
    const args = JSON.parse(toolCall.function.arguments);
    const result = await handler(args);
    return { tool_call_id: toolCall.id, content: result };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
      content: `Tool execution error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      isError: true
    };
  }
}

// ─── Agent Loop Endpoint ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

app.post("/api/conversations/:id/messages", async (req, res) => {
  const conversation = conversations.get(req.params.id);
  const { content, config } = req.body as { content?: string; config?: ApiConfig };
  const prompt = content?.trim();

  if (!conversation) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "conversation not found" });
    return;
  }

  if (!prompt) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "content is required" });
    return;
  }

  const userMessage: Message = {
    id: id("message"),
    role: "user",
    content: prompt,
    createdAt: now()
  };
  conversation.messages.push(userMessage);
  conversation.title = titleFromPrompt(prompt);
  conversation.updatedAt = now();
  await persistStore();

  try {
    const agentResult = await runAgentLoop(conversation, config);
    res.status(201).json({
      conversation,
      userMessage,
      assistantMessage: agentResult.finalMessage,
      toolCalls: agentResult.toolCalls,
      turns: agentResult.turns
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown server error"
    });
  }
});

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const body = req.body as {
    messages?: ChatMessage[];

  if (!body.messages?.length) {

  }

  try {

    res.json({

    });

    });
  }
});

app.post("/api/tools/run-command", async (req, res) => {
  const { command, cwd } = req.body as { command?: string; cwd?: string };

  if (!command) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "command is required" });
    return;
  }

  const denied = DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS.find((pattern) => pattern.test(command));
  if (denied) {
    res.status(403).json({
      ok: false,
      code: 403,
      stdout: "",
      stderr: `Command blocked by SuperCodex safety policy: ${command}`
    });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const result = await execAsync(command, {
      cwd: safeResolvePath(cwd || WORKSPACE_ROOT),
      timeout: 20_000,
      maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024
    });

    res.json({
      ok: true,
      stdout: result.stdout,
      stderr: result.stderr
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error & { stdout?: string; stderr?: string; code?: number };
    res.status(200).json({
      ok: false,
      code: err.code ?? 1,
      stdout: err.stdout ?? "",
      stderr: err.stderr ?? err.message
    });
  }
});

// ─── Agent Loop (ReAct) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type AgentResult = {
  finalMessage: Message;
  toolCalls: Array<{ id: string; name: string; args: string; result: string }>;
  turns: number;
};

async function runAgentLoop(
  conversation: Conversation,
  config?: ApiConfig
): Promise<AgentResult> {
  const chatMessages: ChatMessage[] = [
    { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
    ...conversation.messages.map(toChatMessage)
  ];

  const toolCallLog: Array<{ id: string; name: string; args: string; result: string }> = [];
  let turns = 0;
  const allowTools = shouldEnableTools(conversation);

  while (turns < MAX_AGENT_TURNS) {
    turns++;

    const response = await callLLM(chatMessages, config, allowTools);

    const choice = response.choices?.[0];
    const message = choice?.message;

    if (!message) {
      throw new Error("LLM returned no choices");
    }

    // If LLM wants to call tools
    if (message.tool_calls && message.tool_calls.length > 0) {
      const assistantToolMessage: Message = {
        id: id("message"),
        role: "assistant",
        content: message.content?.trim() || "",
        tool_calls: message.tool_calls,
        createdAt: now()
      };
      conversation.messages.push(assistantToolMessage);
      conversation.updatedAt = assistantToolMessage.createdAt;

      // Add assistant message with tool_calls
      chatMessages.push({
        role: "assistant",
        content: message.content || null,
        tool_calls: message.tool_calls
      });

      // Execute each tool and add results
      for (const toolCall of message.tool_calls) {
        const result = await executeToolCall(toolCall);
        toolCallLog.push({
          id: toolCall.id,
          name: toolCall.function.name,
          args: toolCall.function.arguments,
          result: result.content
        });

        conversation.messages.push({
          id: id("message"),
          role: "tool",
          content: result.content,
          tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
          toolName: toolCall.function.name,
          createdAt: now()
        });
        conversation.updatedAt = now();

        chatMessages.push({
          role: "tool",
          content: result.content,
          tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
          name: toolCall.function.name
        });

        console.log(`[Tool] ${toolCall.function.name}(${toolCall.function.arguments}) => ${result.content.slice(0, 100)}...`);
      }

      // Continue loop - LLM will get tool results and decide next step
      await persistStore();
      continue;
    }

    // LLM returned final text response
    const finalContent = message.content?.trim() || "模型没有返回内容。";

    const assistantMessage: Message = {
      id: id("message"),
      role: "assistant",
      content: finalContent,
      createdAt: now()
    };
    conversation.messages.push(assistantMessage);
    conversation.updatedAt = now();
    await persistStore();

    return {
      finalMessage: assistantMessage,
      toolCalls: toolCallLog,
      turns
    };
  }

  // Max turns reached - force a final response
  chatMessages.push({
    role: "system",
    content: "You have reached the maximum number of tool calls. Please provide your final answer based on what you have gathered."
  });

  const response = await callLLM(chatMessages, config, false);
  const finalContent = response.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim() || "已达到最大工具调用次数限制。";

  const assistantMessage: Message = {
    id: id("message"),
    role: "assistant",
    content: finalContent,
    createdAt: now()
  };
  conversation.messages.push(assistantMessage);
  conversation.updatedAt = now();
  await persistStore();

  return {
    finalMessage: assistantMessage,
    toolCalls: toolCallLog,
    turns
  };
}

async function callLLM(messages: ChatMessage[], config?: ApiConfig, enableTools = false) {
  const effective = {
    baseUrl: normalizeBaseUrl(config?.baseUrl || settings.baseUrl),
    apiKey: config?.apiKey || settings.apiKey,
    model: config?.model || settings.model
  };

  if (!effective.baseUrl || !effective.apiKey) {
    return {
      choices: [{
        message: {
          content: fallbackOfficeReply(messages),
          tool_calls: undefined
        }
      }]
    } as ChatCompletionResponse;
  }

  const toolsArray = enableTools ? getToolDefinitions() : [];

  const upstream = await fetch(`${effective.baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${effective.apiKey}`,
      "Content-Type": "application/json"
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      model: effective.model,
      messages,
      ...(toolsArray.length > 0 ? { tools: toolsArray, tool_choice: "auto" } : {}),
      temperature: 0.2
    })
  });

  const payload = (await upstream.json()) as ChatCompletionResponse;
  if (!upstream.ok) {
    throw new Error(payload?.error?.message ?? "Upstream API request failed");
  }

  return payload;
}

async function completeChat(messages: ChatMessage[], config?: ApiConfig) {
  const response = await callLLM(messages, config, false);
  return response.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim() || "模型没有返回内容。";
}

function fallbackOfficeReply(messages: ChatMessage[]) {
  const lastUser = [...messages].reverse().find((message) => message.role === "user");
  const task = lastUser?.content || "这个任务";
  return [
    `我已经收到：${task}`,
    "",
    "在未配置 API Key 的本地模式下，我可以先给出一个可执行的办公 Agent 处理框架：",
    "1. 明确目标、交付物和截止时间。",
    "2. 收集相关邮件、文档、聊天记录或网页资料。",
    "3. 提炼结论、风险和下一步行动。",
    "4. 生成可复用的回复、报告、清单或自动化流程。",
    "",
    "配置真实模型 API 后，这里会切换为你的模型输出。"
  ].join("\n");
}

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function shouldEnableTools(conversation: Conversation) {
  const lastUser = [...conversation.messages]
    .reverse()
    .find((message): message is Message => message.role === "user");
  const text = lastUser?.content.toLowerCase() || "";
  const toolSignals = [
    "搜索",
    "查一下",
    "网页",
    "http://",
    "https://",
    "运行",
    "命令",
    "shell",
    "终端",
    "文件",
    "读取",
    "写入",
    "目录",
    "安装",
    "npm",
    "fetch",
    "search",
    "read",
    "write",
    "list",
    "install"
  ];
  return toolSignals.some((signal) => text.includes(signal));
}

function toChatMessage(msg: StoredMessage): ChatMessage {
  if (msg.role === "tool") {
    return {
      role: "tool",
      content: msg.content,
      tool_call_id: msg.tool_call_id,
      name: msg.toolName
    };
  }
  return {
    role: msg.role,
    content: msg.content,
    tool_calls: (msg as Message).tool_calls
  };
}

async function initializeStore() {
  try {
    const raw = await fs.readFile(DATA_FILE, "utf-8");
    const store = JSON.parse(raw) as PersistedStore;
    store.projects.forEach((project) => projects.set(project.id, project));
    store.conversations.forEach((conversation) => conversations.set(conversation.id, conversation));
    store.skills.forEach((skill) => skills.set(skill.id, skill));
    store.automations.forEach((automation) => automations.set(automation.id, automation));
    ensureSeedSkills();
  } catch (error) {
    seedState();
    await persistStore();
  }
}

async function persistStore() {
  const store: PersistedStore = {
    projects: [...projects.values()],
    conversations: [...conversations.values()],
    skills: [...skills.values()],
    automations: [...automations.values()]
  };
  await fs.mkdir(DATA_DIR, { recursive: true });
  await fs.writeFile(DATA_FILE, JSON.stringify(store, null, 2), "utf-8");
}

function safeResolvePath(inputPath: string) {
  const resolved = path.resolve(WORKSPACE_ROOT, inputPath || ".");
  if (resolved !== WORKSPACE_ROOT && !resolved.startsWith(`${WORKSPACE_ROOT}${path.sep}`)) {
    throw new Error(`Path is outside workspace: ${inputPath}`);
  }
  return resolved;
}

// ─── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const MAX_AGENT_TURNS = 10;
const WORKSPACE_ROOT = process.cwd();
const DATA_DIR = path.join(WORKSPACE_ROOT, ".supercodex");
const DATA_FILE = path.join(DATA_DIR, "state.json");
const DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS = [
  /\brm\s+-rf\b/,
  /\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b/,
  /\bgit\s+clean\s+-fd\b/,
  /\bsudo\b/,
  />\s*\/dev\/(disk|rdisk)/,
  /\bmkfs\b/,

];

const systemPrompt =
  "You are SuperCodex, a general office agent. Help with workplace tasks such as email, documents, research, planning, automation, meetings, operations, and cross-app workflows. " +
  "Be practical, concise, and action-oriented. " +
  "You have access to tools. Use them when they can help complete the task. " +
  "When a tool call is needed, respond with tool_calls. When you have the final answer, respond with plain text content.";

const settings: Required<ApiConfig> = {
  baseUrl: process.env.API_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1",
  apiKey: process.env.API_KEY ?? "",
  model: process.env.API_MODEL ?? "gpt-4.1"
};

const tools = new Map<string, ToolDefinition>();
const toolHandlers = new Map<string, (args: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<string>>();

function registerTool(definition: ToolDefinition, handler: (args: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<string>) {
  tools.set(definition.function.name, definition);
  toolHandlers.set(definition.function.name, handler);
}

registerTool(

      const regex = /class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]*)"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/a>/g;
      let match;
      while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null && results.length < num) {
        results.push(`[${match[2]}](${match[1]})`);
      }
      return results.length > 0
        ? results.map((r, i) => `${i + 1}. ${r}`).join("\n")
        : "No results found.";
    } catch (error) {
      return `Search failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "run_command",
      description: "Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          command: { type: "string", description: "Shell command to execute" },
          cwd: { type: "string", description: "Working directory (optional)" }
        },
        required: ["command"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const command = String(args.command || "");
    const cwd = safeResolvePath(String(args.cwd || WORKSPACE_ROOT));
    const denied = DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS.find((pattern) => pattern.test(command));
    if (denied) {
      return `Command blocked by SuperCodex safety policy: ${command}`;
    }
    try {
      const result = await execAsync(command, {
        cwd,
        timeout: 30_000,
        maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 * 5
      });
      const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join("\n");
      return output || "(Command executed successfully, no output)";
    } catch (error) {
      const err = error as Error & { stdout?: string; stderr?: string };
      return `Error: ${err.stderr || err.message}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "read_file",
      description: "Read the contents of a file.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "File path (absolute or relative)" },
          limit: { type: "number", description: "Max lines to read (default 200)" }
        },
        required: ["path"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const filePath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || ""));
    const limit = Number(args.limit) || 200;
    try {
      const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
      const lines = content.split("\n");
      const truncated = lines.slice(0, limit).join("\n");
      return lines.length > limit
        ? `${truncated}\n\n... (truncated, ${lines.length - limit} more lines)`
        : truncated;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to read file: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "write_file",
      description: "Write content to a file.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "File path" },
          content: { type: "string", description: "File content" }
        },
        required: ["path", "content"]
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const filePath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || ""));
    const content = String(args.content || "");
    try {
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
      await fs.writeFile(filePath, content, "utf-8");
      return `File written successfully: ${filePath}`;
    } catch (error) {
      return `Failed to write file: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`;
    }
  }
);

registerTool(
  {
    type: "function",
    function: {
      name: "list_directory",
      description: "List files and directories in a given path.",
      parameters: {
        type: "object",
        properties: {
          path: { type: "string", description: "Directory path (default: current working directory)" }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  async (args) => {
    const dirPath = safeResolvePath(String(args.path || WORKSPACE_ROOT));
    try {

      return entries
        .map((e) => (e.isDirectory() ? `[dir] ${e.name}` : `[file] ${e.name}`))
        .join("\n") || "(Empty directory)";

    }
  }
);

function getToolDefinitions(): ToolDefinition[] {
  return [...tools.values()];
}

async function executeToolCall(toolCall: ToolCall): Promise<ToolResult> {
  const handler = toolHandlers.get(toolCall.function.name);
  if (!handler) {
    return {
      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
      content: `Unknown tool: ${toolCall.function.name}`,
      isError: true
    };
  }
  try {
    const args = JSON.parse(toolCall.function.arguments);
    const result = await handler(args);
    return { tool_call_id: toolCall.id, content: result };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      tool_call_id: toolCall.id,
      content: `Tool execution error: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      isError: true
    };
  }
}

app.post("/api/conversations/:id/messages", async (req, res) => {
  const conversation = conversations.get(req.params.id);
  const { content, config } = req.body as { content?: string; config?: ApiConfig };
  const prompt = content?.trim();

  if (!conversation) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: "conversation not found" });
    return;
  }

  if (!prompt) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "content is required" });
    return;
  }

  const userMessage: Message = {
    id: id("message"),
    role: "user",
    content: prompt,
    createdAt: now()
  };
  conversation.messages.push(userMessage);
  conversation.title = titleFromPrompt(prompt);
  conversation.updatedAt = now();
  await persistStore();

  try {
    const agentResult = await runAgentLoop(conversation, config);
    res.status(201).json({
      conversation,
      userMessage,
      assistantMessage: agentResult.finalMessage,
      toolCalls: agentResult.toolCalls,
      turns: agentResult.turns
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown server error"
    });
  }
});

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {

});

app.post("/api/tools/run-command", async (req, res) => {
  const { command, cwd } = req.body as { command?: string; cwd?: string };

  if (!command) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "command is required" });
    return;
  }

  const denied = DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS.find((pattern) => pattern.test(command));
  if (denied) {
    res.status(403).json({
      ok: false,
      code: 403,
      stdout: "",
      stderr: `Command blocked by SuperCodex safety policy: ${command}`
    });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const result = await execAsync(command, {
      cwd: safeResolvePath(cwd || WORKSPACE_ROOT),
      timeout: 20_000,
      maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024
    });

    res.json({
      ok: true,
      stdout: result.stdout,
      stderr: result.stderr
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error & { stdout?: string; stderr?: string; code?: number };
    res.status(200).json({
      ok: false,
      code: err.code ?? 1,
      stdout: err.stdout ?? "",
      stderr: err.stderr ?? err.message
    });
  }
});
